en.title: Legal Advisor
en.prompt: I want you to act as my legal advisor. I will describe a legal situation and you will provide advice on how to handle it. You should only reply with your advice, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. My first request is [legal situation]

related.title: startup tech lawyer
related.remark: Output protocol and contract draft according to requirements.

metaDescription: Legal trouble? Describe your situation and receive professional advice on handling it. Direct legal guidance without explanations.

faq.q: Can I follow AI legal advice?
faq.a: Do not. The AI doesn't know mainland China's current legal details and often mixes in common-law concepts. For serious matters like lawsuits, contracts, labor, or divorce, consult a licensed lawyer. The AI is only for rough understanding of concepts, not a basis for decisions.

faq.q: Can it clarify differences between Chinese and American law?
faq.a: General direction yes, but details get mixed up. For instance "intellectual property" has similar concepts in both but very different specific provisions. For cross-border business, verify AI claims with local lawyers. Its sources are not authoritative, and it doesn't distinguish federal from state law.
